additionalData.description: This field contains additional data, which may be returned in a particular response.

pspReference.description: A new reference to uniquely identify this request.

refusalReason.description: In case of refusal, an informational message for the reason.

resultCode.description:
The response:
* In case of success, it is `payout-submit-received`.
* In case of an error, an informational message is returned.
